description_long: This is a two-story massage shop with a warm orange exterior and a green gabled roof, featuring decorative geometric patterns along the facade. The front of the building has two large windows on each floor, a green balcony with a white umbrella, and a prominent sign in Chinese characters. The ground floor includes a glass entrance door and a small awning above, while the balcony is adorned with a table and chair, suggesting a welcoming waiting area. The side and rear walls are simpler, with additional windows and a large billboard sign on one side. Air conditioning units and exterior lights are mounted on the facade, adding to the urban character. The building sits on a gray stone-tiled base, indicating its placement on a sidewalk or urban lot.
description: A two-story orange massage shop with a green roof, decorative facade, balcony, and prominent signage, set on a stone-tiled base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, two large windows, a green balcony with a white umbrella, and a prominent sign in Chinese characters.
description_view_1: Side view featuring a large billboard sign with red stars and a graphic, as well as additional windows and the green roof.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain orange wall with decorative trim and no windows or doors, highlighting the building's solid structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with multiple windows and a partial view of the balcony and umbrella, showing the building's symmetry.
attribute_signage: There are two main signs: a vertical sign with Chinese characters mounted perpendicular to the front facade, and a large horizontal sign above the entrance, both with printed text and mounted on metal brackets. A large billboard with red stars and graphics is attached to the side wall. All signage appears to be non-illuminated and made of printed plastic or metal panels.
attribute_window_displays: None; windows are clear with no visible displays, posters, or decorative elements behind them.
attribute_lighting_style: Wall-mounted exterior lights are visible, likely providing functional illumination with a neutral to cool color temperature. No decorative or dramatic lighting is present.
attribute_entrance_design: The main entrance features a single glass door with a metal frame, topped by a small green awning. The entrance is accessible from the sidewalk and is flanked by large windows, with signage above and a balcony overhead.
attribute_architectural_style: Traditional urban East Asian with modern commercial influences, characterized by decorative geometric patterns, a gabled roof, and prominent signage.
